name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Fake Impeachment
body:
The Dems latest theatrics, TONY award worthy? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Fake Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrat base hates President Trump, and to satisfy their unruly base, the Dems are putting on an act, **a fake impeachment!** Read my blog this week and I'll explain this latest desperate attempt to stop the President. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Debate Worth Watching? Probably Not...](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats are gearing up for another lengthy presidential debate. In this week's blog, I save you the trouble of having to watch and offer up a better alternative! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [What's The Press Got Against Melania Trump?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-u/)
The First Lady's treatment by the mainstream press is, in my humble opinion, shameful. In this weeks' blog post, I explain how First Lady Melania Trump has been belittled, criticized, undermined and simply ignored! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Trump's Republican Rivals](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdykdka-kujkulhluu-n/)
An overwhelming majority of Republicans support Donald Trump's reelection to the presidency. But not all. I'm on the blog today talking about President Trump's Republican rivals and what I think their chances may be.

Click the link below to read this week's blog. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: TODAY: President Trump visits the border
body:
President Donald J. Trump is in California today, where he traveled to Otay Mesa—a community just north of the border—to get a firsthand look at...

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd8a52791d&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • September 18, 2019

** TODAY: President Trump visits the border
------------------------------------------------------------
President Donald J. Trump is in California today, where he traveled to Otay Mesa—a community just north of the border—to get a firsthand look at new wall construction.

The wall may be President Trump’s most important promise kept to the American people. As a matter of policy, it adds to and replaces outdated, often embarrassingly ineffective fencing to protect our country from human smugglers, drug traffickers, and criminal cartels. As a matter of symbolism, it reassures Americans that after years of empty promises from Washington to fix immigration, their voices mean something.

Watch: The wall is going up fast! (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bcb7de440b&e=3ee4985eea)

So today, despite resistance from open-border Democrats to enforcing laws that already exist and to keeping promises they already made, the wall is going up. American families, law enforcement, and millions of legal immigrants will be safer for it.

Politico: President Trump’s plan to stem border crossings gets results. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b01cf1196c&e=3ee4985eea)

More: “Trump keeps winning on immigration – against all odds.” (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d632ecc584&e=3ee4985eea)

** In photos: Ivanka Trump at the Boys & Girls Clubs of America
------------------------------------------------------------
Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross co-chaired the third American Workforce Policy Advisory Board meeting this morning. Part of an effort to expand training opportunities for Americans of all ages, today’s meeting was hosted by Boys & Girls Clubs of America CEO Jim Clark—a fellow Advisory board member—at one of the organization’s local clubs here in Washington, D.C.

Earlier this year, President Trump established the Advisory Board to build on his promise to bring Americans off the sidelines and into our booming labor force. With some of America’s top leaders signed on, including Apple CEO Tim Cook and Walmart CEO Doug McMillon, this vision is quickly becoming a reality.

Photos: Ivanka Trump and Secretary Ross tour the Boys & Girls Club (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af7c1e7895&e=3ee4985eea)

“Ensuring that the workers of tomorrow have the skills they'll need to thrive in a rapidly changing economy is a core mission of the White House,” Ivanka Trump said.

The Pledge to America’s Workers, which brings the public and private sectors together to fulfill that mission, has secured more than 12 million new career opportunities for American workers and students in just a little over a year so far.

See how President Trump has helped more than 12 million American workers! (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9bf504cc27&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
President Trump, joined by new White House National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien, greets Military personnel upon his arrival at Marine Corps Air Station Miramar in San Diego, California | September 18, 2019

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f956e440c1&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da680261c5&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ddfd6a6523)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Yang2020
subject: They continue to underestimate us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
The media is severely underestimating this campaign. USA Today just published this:

| [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/1154?t=1&akid=485%2E377263%2ElAtCdq) Friend --

The media is severely underestimating this campaign. _USA Today_ just published this: _“Andrew Yang is not going to be the Democratic nominee for president in 2020...He may have the best explanation for how the Trump presidency happened...”_ Let’s prove them wrong.

**We have 48 hours to reach our goal of $250,000.** Every contribution to our campaign proves that Andrew CAN win. Together, we can show that a campaign built from the ground up with people first will come out on top.**[ Rush $10 or more before midnight. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10223?t=5&amount=10&akid=485%2E377263%2ElAtCdq) ** | [ Contribute ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10223?t=8&akid=485%2E377263%2ElAtCdq)
---
Our message is resonating across the nation. We’re ready for a candidate with a plan to address our changing economy head on. _That candidate is Andrew Yang._

Andrew understands why Trump won -- and Andrew will win because he knows how to solve the problems that Trump built his campaign around. [**Contribute $10 or more to reach our goal in 48 hours.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10223?t=7&amount=10&akid=485%2E377263%2ElAtCdq)

Thanks for everything you do,
Yang2020
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10223?t=6&akid=485%2E377263%2ElAtCdq)

| | | | | |

| Dear Patriot,
Like me, I am sure you have watched as the current crop of Democratic Presidential Candidates fighting over who is can be furthest to the Left. Well, no matter who "wins" America loses. All of them are on the extreme side of Socialism.
But, one thing that leaves a pit in my stomach is their pledge to provide healthcare for ALL illegal immigrants in the United States of America.
[Click here to see for yourself.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018yiGmLh8HJKH7WCp1seeOdeoS0xCWq_gZH_dHyQY9hknJEAPkse9CPsnLuzXZJMHTM-4N9wEgMrXG3K1i4ImHGrRFR2pOAPI1T1ugJueeYoJdn1Px1CAUaHc7M1SLEgth0nvXcPlFQ_ktZWZ067TR3FV1iADOS12aHZ5qloNaKhWiMv0nCyY6db__Jd4T1z8n72MW0vUIfUUoaGk47vQ6aPtX-Tcz5rDh4D2qa6wJeV1vfAXfswBswq73GhKyuhRdHgKDMphDeI=&c=LcuXvuQ5dnSjs3wPrEP_svTvVGuzSDHIp1TAamJYYEAy6lTOEdAA-w==&ch=ZTGzI9eStCSSeVM4EXt4ghpLhnPUt8axKHvOjcuWaWQSj_a4VSsz2g==)
I urge you to make a small donation today, so I can help to fight these Socialist policies that will ruin our great country.

| I, for one, as should any sensible American citizen, STRONGLY OPPOSE this immoral and fiscally disastrous policy.
Representative Susan Wild will support this policy as she joins the "Squad" headed by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the rest of the Liberal Elites in their push for Socialism.

*Name*, please support my efforts in defeating Rep. Susan Wild in 2020 by donating today. A pledge of even $5 or $10 will go a long way in winning this election.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: America's future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Here’s the thing: right now America is at a turning point that will define this country’s future for generations. We need leadership that understands America’s strength comes from compassion and diversity – not hate and division.
As important as next November is – it’s at the local level that we can start moving the needle back on track today. Tennesseans like you get to decide your own future. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to the Tennessee Democratic Party right now. Every penny will benefit TNDP’s efforts across the state. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
I’ll be back in Memphis this weekend sharing my positive vision for America’s future and taking questions. You can find the details here. [https://www.mobilize.us/kamalaharris/event/124018/] I hope to see you there!
Thank you,
Kamala

name: Jason Yates
subject: Just how close were these legislative races?
body:
| | Peter, With over 80,000 local and state elections taking place across the nation this year, it’s important to look back on just how incredibly close some of the state legislative races were in 2018. Last year, elections took place in 87 of the nation’s 99 state legislative chambers, representing nearly 82 percent of all state legislative seats. **Select one of the answers below to guess what margin 88 of these individual state legislative races were decided by:** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ry-e7No0I4pwuTUfX1yys6eGW3RenLwzNeYqBUkSORtdSvJ-gsc0IwrlVpD7efClqzTs7BTgM2FvCa5WcW2vS7D8nMwWUl5sgTLSZNDr50viA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=1) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ry-e7No0I4pwuTUfX1yys6eGW3RenLwzNeYqBUkSORtdSvJ-gsc0IwrlVpD7efClqzTs7BTgM2FvCa5WcW2vS7DSRsjfVvCjyBz8M-Q_S17GQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ry-e7No0I4pwuTUfX1yys6eGW3RenLwzNeYqBUkSORtdSvJ-gsc0IwrlVpD7efClqzTs7BTgM2FvCa5WcW2vS7D-MQiL81NkqjIwzB1fbs_Jg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=3) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ry-e7No0I4pwuTUfX1yys6eGW3RenLwzNeYqBUkSORtdSvJ-gsc0IwrlVpD7efClqzTs7BTgM2FvCa5WcW2vS7DWEl-ZoESbLtmXAgkUO8mHw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=4) It’s so important that we, as Christians, register and then vote in every election. With races this close, we have the opportunity to make a real impact when we take action and vote. This Sunday, September 22, churches across the country are participating in [National Voter Registration Sunday](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNElvZOspC_AA5USuqBlKgAR&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=5). If you are leading this voter registration drive effort in your church - thank you! If your church is not participating, please check out the [resources to share with your church](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNElvZOspC_AA5USuqBlKgAR&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=6) for a future date. Join us in praying for a positive movement of civic engagement on National Voter Registration Sunday this week! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=7)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=8).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190919qna01&n=11)

| He is attempting to eliminate Gifted and Talented programs for city's brightest and reduce the standards at our specialized schools that have produced Nobel Prize winners.
And instead of investing in classroom education to lift up struggling students, Bill de Blasio has squandered $773 million intended to turn around underperforming schools and funneled up to $1,400 per day to high-priced consultants.
As a member of Congress, I will fight to hold Mayor de Blasio and New York City's education bureaucrats accountable and ensure that the billions in federal tax dollars our city receive are spent properly on our children's future.

clean_body: I appeared on Tucker Carlson Tonight to discuss Bill de Blasio’s war on New York City families seeking a high-quality public education for their children. | | | | | | == | Friend, I appeared on Tucker Carlson Tonight on Tuesday to discuss Bill de Blasio's war on New York City families seeking a high-quality public education for their children. Instead of raising standards and encouraging student achievement, Bill de Blasio is using our schools to advance his radical, socialist agenda. == and == | | | == | | | He is attempting to eliminate Gifted and Talented programs for city's brightest and reduce the standards at our specialized schools that have produced Nobel Prize winners. And instead of investing in classroom education to lift up struggling students, Bill de Blasio has squandered $773 million intended to turn around underperforming schools and funneled up to $1,400 per day to high-priced consultants. As a member of Congress, I will fight to hold Mayor de Blasio and New York City's education bureaucrats accountable and ensure that the billions in federal tax dollars our city receive are spent properly on our children's future. == | | | == ==, ==, == == == | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | I know that if you're with me we can take back our Congressional District and == Your support is appreciated, Nicole Malliotakis | | | | | | | | | == == == | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) | | | | Nicole for New York (FEDERAL) | PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306 | | Sent by mailto:nicole@nicoleforny.com

name: Cory Booker
subject: We must rise together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, My career in public life began over 20 years ago. It all started when I decided to run for City Council in Newark. I first ran for office because I was frustrated by the challenges facing my community -- issues like gun violence, open-air drug dealing, a lack of jobs, tenants being treated unfairly by their landlords. I believed that we could take on these tough challenges by bringing people together in common purpose. As I've gone on to become the mayor of Newark and now a United States senator, that's exactly how we've won the toughest fights. That's why I'm in this race, and that's how I believe we'll win next November. **Will you join me?** [**If you believe our next president should be a uniter instead of a divider, consider donating $5 today to further our vision for a fairer, more inclusive nation.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190919_CB_20190919-fr-CB-CABstory-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") My entire career, I've run toward big problems and accomplished things that people said were impossible -- and every time, it was through uniting folks around a common purpose to get the job done. This is a moral moment we find ourselves in, team. At times, the challenges we face seem insurmountable -- whether it's dealing with the existential threat of climate change, unraveling decades of systemic racism or fighting back against the frightening attacks on our democracy. But, throughout our history, we only ever realized our full potential when we came together as a people and demanded action. How we move forward as a nation depends on whether we can do that again -- even as we seem to be greatly divided. We have a president right now who tries to tear us apart every single day. What he doesn't understand is that the lines that divide us are nowhere near as strong as the ties that bind us. **We will prove this once again when we come together and unite from a place of love and defeat his hate.** [**If you 're ready to replace Donald Trump with a president who will counter hatred with love, please make a donation today. Let's start healing our country after years of Trump's bigotry and division.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190919_CB_20190919-fr-CB-CABstory-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I dream of a country in which we're measured by our ability to love and create a fairer, more just nation for everyone. That should be how we judge ourselves -- and that's the standard I'll hold myself to every single day if I have the honor of serving as your president. **Together, we will win -- and together, we will rise.** Are you with me?
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190919_CB_20190919-fr-CB-CABstory-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bdc/5fca0d19/740f6df6/291e5b0e/2046166559/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bdc/5fca0d19/740f6df6/291e5b0d/2046166559/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bdc/5fca0d19/740f6df6/291e5b0c/2046166559/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bdc/5fca0d19/740f6df6/291e5b0b/2046166559/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bdc/5fca0d19/740f6df6/291e5b0a/2046166559/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bdc/5fca0d19/740f6df6/291e5b0e/2046166559/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

| **The Sierra Club just endorsed Mike 's 2020 re-election campaign!**

[Let's keep this momentum going and prove Mike has unparalleled support as he continues fighting for our environment. Add your name now!](https://act.myngp.com/el/nahvRO-rNq5TBDzJpWRdLoY1ra5L81MhTlfjaEn7tkM=/nv7gyH4Mh018mIB8Xc1YVMzzzGJfoHWcG9t-wFG8FCU=)

Peter - Mike is a longtime champion for environmental protections, which is why the Sierra Club has just endorsed his 2020 campaign.

He's fought for critical protections for public lands here in California, and was an original cosponsor of the Green New Deal - and he's continuing to preserve and protect our environment every day.

[We have a lot of work ahead to ensure future generations can enjoy our precious natural resources, and we hope you'll join Mike in taking action. Add your name now ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/nahvRO-rNq5TBDzJpWRdLoY1ra5L81MhTlfjaEn7tkM=/nv7gyH4Mh018mIB8Xc1YVMzzzGJfoHWcG9t-wFG8FCU=)

subject: Sen. Schumer is wrong

body:
[1]Beto for America

Yesterday, when asked about Beto’s bold plan for a mandatory assault
weapon buyback, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer said:

“I don’t know of any other Democrat who agrees with Beto.”

With respect to the Minority Leader, a recent Monmouth University poll
found that nearly 70% of Democrats support Beto’s mandatory buyback for
assault weapons. A Washington Post poll found 74% of Democrats support it.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34445?refcode=ema20190919-56129&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=56129%2E444211%2Ew-8zyw ]Clearly, we need more Democrats who will lead, and a president who
will take this head-on -- but we won’t get that unless Beto is elected.
Will you help us out by chipping in $3 today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34445?refcode=ema20190919-56129&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=56129%2E444211%2Ew-8zyw ]Give $3 now

In fact, even several of Schumer’s colleagues support Beto’s plan -- for
example, both Sen. Kamala Harris and Sen. Cory Booker said they back
Beto’s mandatory assault weapon buyback.

Look,
Beto would support this even if it weren’t popular, because this is about
doing the right thing to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic.

But the fact is that the vast majority of Democrats do support Beto’s plan
-- which means it’s time for leadership that embraces bold gun safety
reform.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34445?refcode=ema20190919-56129&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=56129%2E444211%2Ew-8zyw ]Help us elect a president who will take bold action on gun safety by
supporting Beto’s campaign today.

We’re going to show everyone that America is ready for bold leadership on
gun safety.

-Team Beto

clean_body: [1]Beto for America Yesterday, when asked about Beto’s bold plan for a mandatory assault weapon buyback, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer said: “I don’t know of any other Democrat who agrees with Beto.” With respect to the Minority Leader, a recent Monmouth University poll found that nearly 70% of Democrats support Beto’s mandatory buyback for assault weapons. A Washington Post poll found 74% of Democrats support it. [ ]Clearly, we need more Democrats who will lead, and a president who will take this head-on -- but we won’t get that unless Beto is elected. Will you help us out by chipping in $3 today? [ ]Give $3 now In fact, even several of Schumer’s colleagues support Beto’s plan -- for example, both Sen. Kamala Harris and Sen. Cory Booker said they back Beto’s mandatory assault weapon buyback. Look, Beto would support this even if it weren’t popular, because this is about doing the right thing to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic. But the fact is that the vast majority of Democrats do support Beto’s plan -- which means it’s time for leadership that embraces bold gun safety reform. [ ]Help us elect a president who will take bold action on gun safety by supporting Beto’s campaign today. We’re going to show everyone that America is ready for bold leadership on gun safety. -Team Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Polling Update, SaraGideon.com
subject: Great news! [poll]
body:
The math works.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2e/4bef7a87/688b5ea0/287f0b61/3267166233/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, this is big!
A research group just did a poll in Maine - and it's great news for us. Here's why:
_" When asked if Sen. Susan Collins has performed 'well enough to deserve re-election' or if it was 'time to give a new person a chance to do better,' 38 percent said re-election and **55 percent said new person**."
\- POLITICO Morning Score_
The math works for us. If 55% of Mainers are ready for new leadership in the Senate, Susan Collins is _OUT!_
Now we need to make sure that every single Mainer - in every corner of the state - hears Sara's message.
**That means we need to go up with ads. We need to hire field staff. But all that takes resources, so we have to ask:**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline on September 30th? With this new poll and our upcoming deadline, this is a big moment for our campaign.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2e/4bef7a87/688b5ea0/287f0b60/3267166233/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTktYyJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190919-c")
This poll proves once and for all that Sara Gideon can win. It won't be easy, and it certainly won't be cheap. But if we are willing to put in the hard work, we can flip this Senate seat.
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2e/4bef7a87/688b5ea0/287f0b67/3267166233/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTktYyJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190919-c")****

PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

subject: Morning Joe just revealed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I'll tell you what I told Morning Joe: [_**I will NEVER let Donald Trump take this critical state from Democrats. I need a MASSIVE response -- 756 more gifts before midnight -- to counter Trump's vicious, anti-Democratic rally here. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190919_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

This week, I watched Donald Trump swoop into my home district.

I watched him hold a massive rally smearing our families.

And I watched him pledge to do everything in his power to flip our state red.

But I just have one thing to say in response:

Every special-interest dollar he floods into our state...

Every false attack ad he runs against me and my fellow Democrats...

Every vicious rally he holds here to turn this state against us...

**_Will never be enough to flip New Mexico red and sabotage Democrats' shot to win the entire Senate._**

This next push after Trump's rally is the most critical we've ever faced.

I need a powerful response -- 756 more gifts before midnight -- to prove that we will fight with everything we have to rescue this state from Republicans' grasps.

Can I count on your immediate $5? | | ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190919_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190919_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---
Thank you,

Ben Ray
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a7/18e32a7f/532e1e02/7bf395a9/4239620979/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a7/18e32a7f/532e1e02/7bf395ae/4239620979/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a7/18e32a7f/532e1e02/7bf395af/4239620979/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a7/18e32a7f/532e1e02/7bf395ac/4239620979/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a7/18e32a7f/532e1e02/7bf395ad/4239620979/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4a7/18e32a7f/532e1e02/7bf395a2/4239620979/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

This is an amazing distinction. We're honored. Now we need your help to make the most of it. "" "" | Paid for by Tim Ryan for America Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! "" We know email can be overwhelming,** so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list "", or unsubscribe from all email by "" | |

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: BREAKING: New super PAC to support Corey Lewandowski
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
The GOP is stacking the deck in New Hampshire, everyone. Earlier this week, they launched a new super PAC to support Trump's former campaign manager, Corey Lewandowski, in his race to defeat me. That's why I'm counting on you to make a donation right now. But first, I want to be really clear about what will happen if you decide to sit this one out.
**There is nothing more important than the race for Senate control in 2020.** If the GOP stays in the majority, they'll continue blocking all of our progress on everything from health care to gun safety, regardless of who sits in the White House, while packing our courts with ultraconservatives in lifetime appointments.
**And according to everyone from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call, losing in New Hampshire would mean handing Republicans Senate control for another two years.** That's why the GOP is so laser-focused on this seat -- right-wing outside groups have spent more against us than all the other in-cycle Democratic senators combined.
**New Hampshire can decide Senate control -- and what you do right now could tip the scales in this must-win race. **We have to raise $10,000 in the next 24 hours to fund our rapid response plans, and I can't get there without your help.
[**Look, if you care about defending New Hampshire 's Senate seat and taking back the Senate for Democrats, I need you to make a gift right now to help make sure we can stop the GOP. Can I count on you to pitch in?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc39d/2a380d31/3dacb730/f0db2e/2181970948/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA5MTlfTVdINENKUzFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190919_MWH4CJS1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you,
Jeanne
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc39d/2a380d31/3dacb730/f0db2e/2181970948/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA5MTlfTVdINENKUzFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190919_MWH4CJS1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc39d/2a380d31/3dacb730/f0db2f/2181970948/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

| Thank you for your continuing support of my campaign to return conservative leadership to the 25th District. With your help, we can show Katie Hill and the liberal Democrats in Washington that we're the candidate to beat in 2020.

Below, please find the invitation to our upcoming fundraising event. I hope that you will join us on September 29th to discuss the future of Republican leadership in CA25, and what we can do to take back this seat next year.

**About Angela Underwood Jacobs:**

Underwood Jacobs currently serves as the regional Senior Vice President of California Bank and Trust, where she helps Californians live their _American Dream_ – purchase their first home, receive a loan to launch a small business, or save for retirement. Underwood Jacobs was the first African American woman elected to the Lancaster City Council, where she has served since 2015. She is the proud wife of a military veteran and a mother that has lived in Antelope Valley for over 25 years.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We have to work harder than every other candidate and team in this race if we want to win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I want to be honest with you about the state of this campaign.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs) Friend --

I want to be honest with you about the state of this campaign.

While we are growing in the polls, we are still behind many of our opponents in terms of fundraising, staff on the ground, and advertisements on the air and online.

And when Carly put out a call to raise $250,000 within 48 hours to catch up, the response so far has not been what we’d hoped.

I think we can get back on track and hit this goal tonight, but it’s going to take an extraordinary effort from every member on this team to do it. [**Can you pitch in before midnight so we can hit our goal?** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10248?t=5&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10248?t=13&amount=5&express_lane=true&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs)
---
| | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10248?t=12&amount=10&express_lane=true&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs)
---

| [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10248?t=9&amount=25&express_lane=true&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10248?t=8&amount=25&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs)
---
I’m the husband to an amazing woman and the father of two young boys.

I know the country my sons will grow up in is going to be very different from the one I grew up in, and I want to look back at my life knowing I did everything in my power to create the kind of future our children deserve. An America of opportunity and abundance. An America that invests in its people so they can build the lives they want for themselves and their families.

[ **I hope you feel the same and are compelled to give everything you can in this moment so we can build this America together. Please pitch in now.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10248?t=7&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs)

This fight is too important to sit back.

-Andrew
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10248?t=6&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=557%2E377263%2ELC-KWs) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: BREAKING: AR-15 production and sales ENDING
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
MAJOR GUN SAFETY VICTORY:
Gun manufacturer Colt is ending production and sales of the AR-15.
KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM: Add your name to my petition to BAN assault weapons:
ADD YOUR NAME [https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-ban-assault-weapons/?emci=49718374-14db-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=463701&contactdata=k1B8I%2B78huLxTrYoZqztvRKxLkzaCFh5L1T6DDbK%2Bu3CwNlkvgSuHXiUmdAJnEPrQrT4%2B7mzkKv9y10dh%2FpFdZmPGDxClzaXwhSIMreTQ%2FiOUa2IUjDQzheA04zgOPRy&refcode=em091919&noskip=true&refcode2=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68]
[images/spacer.gif]
Friend,
This is HUGE. The gun manufacturer Colt just announced they are stopping ALL production and sales of the AR-15. This is a major victory for gun safety.
We have the momentum. The NRA is in shambles, and the gun manufacturers they represent are bending to public pressure.
While the NRA and gun activists’ company line is that gun sales are bigger than ever, today’s announcement by Colt tells the truth: America is sick of mass shootings and is demanding gun control legislation.
Add your name to join them: Tell Congress to ban assault weapons. [https://teresatomlinson.com/ban-assault-weapons-now?ms=091919]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-ban-assault-weapons/?emci=49718374-14db-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=463701&contactdata=k1B8I%2B78huLxTrYoZqztvRKxLkzaCFh5L1T6DDbK%2Bu3CwNlkvgSuHXiUmdAJnEPrQrT4%2B7mzkKv9y10dh%2FpFdZmPGDxClzaXwhSIMreTQ%2FiOUa2IUjDQzheA04zgOPRy&refcode=em091919&noskip=true&refcode2=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68]
Last month I joined March for Our Lives organizers in Roswell for a gun safety town hall, and the consensus is clear: We need to do everything we can to save lives.
That means we need a background check for every gun sale, red flag laws that keep weapons out of the hands of domestic abusers, and a movement in Georgia to take on David Perdue, Mitch McConnell, and the NRA. Americans are voting with their wallets — it’s time for McConnell and the NRA to listen to your actual votes as well.
Keep up the momentum by signing my petition to ban assault weapons. [https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-ban-assault-weapons/?emci=49718374-14db-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=463701&contactdata=k1B8I%2B78huLxTrYoZqztvRKxLkzaCFh5L1T6DDbK%2Bu3CwNlkvgSuHXiUmdAJnEPrQrT4%2B7mzkKv9y10dh%2FpFdZmPGDxClzaXwhSIMreTQ%2FiOUa2IUjDQzheA04zgOPRy&refcode=em091919&noskip=true&refcode2=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68]
Thank you for taking this important stand to save lives today. Let’s keep it up.
Yours truly,
Teresa
ADD YOUR NAME [https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-ban-assault-weapons/?emci=49718374-14db-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=463701&contactdata=k1B8I%2B78huLxTrYoZqztvRKxLkzaCFh5L1T6DDbK%2Bu3CwNlkvgSuHXiUmdAJnEPrQrT4%2B7mzkKv9y10dh%2FpFdZmPGDxClzaXwhSIMreTQ%2FiOUa2IUjDQzheA04zgOPRy&refcode=em091919&noskip=true&refcode2=0541c5cc-1edb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68]

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Melania Trump Participates in Reopening of Washington Monument
body:
"First lady Melania Trump, alongside a group of local fourth graders, helped cut the ribbon to re-open the Washington Monument." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20971f4955&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Melania Trump Participates in Reopening of Washington Monument**

“First lady Melania Trump, alongside a group of local fourth graders, helped cut the ribbon to re-open the Washington Monument, which had been under construction in the wake of a 2011 earthquake,” Kate Bennett reports for CNN.

“When it first opened to the public in 1888, it used to take more than 10 minutes to reach the top of the 500-foot Washington Monument, by steam-propelled elevator. Today, it's automated, and the ride in a posh new lift with video screens is just 70 seconds.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d474635d92&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “If you haven’t heard, President Trump has declared war on California, the auto industry and the world’s climate. Or that’s what liberals are saying about his Administration’s plans to revoke California’s waiver that lets it set national fuel economy rules that raise costs for consumers across the country,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67cd9b744b&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “The Trump Administration isn’t prohibiting [automakers] from manufacturing more fuel-efficient and electric cars. Liberals call the President a totalitarian, but he’s the one giving consumers and businesses a choice.”
---
|
---
| Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar are right to push back against the United Nations on abortion, Grace Melton writes for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f80433045e&e=3ee4985eea). “We remain gravely concerned [about] aggressive efforts to reinterpret international instruments to create a new international right to abortion,” the two Cabinet secretaries wrote in a joint letter to diplomats.
---
|
---
| “She’s done a lot with the place. Like anyone who has ever spruced up their home, Melania Trump will have a few new touches to showcase Friday when guests visit the White House for only the second state dinner of the Trump presidency,” Darlene Superville writes in [_The Associated Press_.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f93a2317e2&e=3ee4985eea) “There’s refreshed wall fabric in the Red Room, repurposed draperies in the Green Room and restored furniture in the Blue Room. And those are just some of the home improvement projects the first lady has overseen.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b0536c829&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98d4b5f77d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d5d5f01c2a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

I'm Buck, Rita and Paul's dog, and I hold down the farm while they're out and about campaigning and let me tell you -- I'm the real dog in charge around here. Not a single squirrel nor rabbit gets past my watchful eye. You see, I'm great at keeping the farm safe -- it's my domain. I look out for Rita and Paul every day, but now there's a risk that I can't just bark at until it goes away. Believe me, I've tried. **[Rita and Paul are up against a lot of outside money and they're working tirelessly to fundraise enough before their end-of-quarter goal. Can you help a dog out and donate $20 right now? Growling won't work, but grassroots fundraising will.](https://act.myngp.com/el/hpyvq2wTe0hx6xn024ONqfWSumkcvoJ1P1xvQgS0jt4=/tNpYyYNo4YvHKpflETa_o2JMnGa97Al4PdzyIc-maZI=?refcode=190919-email&recurring=auto&amount=20)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hpyvq2wTe0hx6xn024ONqfWSumkcvoJ1P1xvQgS0jt4=/tNpYyYNo4YvHKpflETa_o2JMnGa97Al4PdzyIc-maZI=?refcode=190919-email&recurring=auto) Every morning, when I'm out on my patrol, I notice that Rita and Paul are up earlier and earlier. They're giving their all to this campaign, and I won't let them take on all the work. Consider me their newest _pawlitical_ advisor. **[At the farm, we all work together, and everyone has a part to play. No matter if it's raining, freezing or Christmas morning, there's work to be done. This campaign feels just like that. We're closing in on the end of the quarter, team, and that means we have a crucial deadline coming up.
**It 's not a normal deadline either: This is the first quarter since a new opponent who has President Trump's endorsement announced that he's going to enter our race.** Not only does he have Trump's support, but he's also a former member of the White House administration and has a ton of high-level connections to Washington elites and special interests that will fuel his campaign.
And he's not the only one we're up against. **There 's also an anti-choice extremist who gave his campaign _$1 million_ of his own money.**
While I don't have that option, I do have this grassroots team. And I know we can keep up.
At the end of the month, our numbers will go public for the whole world to see -- including my opponents. We need to show that we have what it takes to compete, so **we 've set a $50,000 end-of-quarter goal that we need to meet before September is over.**
[_**Seriously -- it 's the most important deadline of our campaign yet, and I'm counting on everyone to help get us there. Chip in now.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa214/18d6a294/4cfc5423/26d6564e/2486561416/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MTkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190919?refcode=jme190919_nd&recurring=true")

name: MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: your survey record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's not too late to give your input on which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington next week.
|
---
| | | __**2019 Supporter Record**__
**Survey prepared for:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Responses needed:** 2,000
**Deadline:** 9:00 AM, September 23rd, 2019

**[Take Mark's Priority Survey>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c7/53d9897e/52a61baa/1c8e0988/1661339478/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-stratresend3")**
---
Derek,

Recently, I asked you to take my fall survey and let me know which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington this week. [**If you haven 't had a chance to take it yet, it's not too late to give your input.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c7/53d9897e/52a61baa/1c8e0988/1661339478/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-stratresend3")

My team showed me the results so far, and your top issues were pretty clear. You want:
* To **secure our elections** from future foreign interference
* Progress on bipartisan, common-sense **gun safety laws**

I'm right there with you, Derek. Our nation is hurting in the wake of one mass shooting after another, and candidly, enough is enough. There are a number of common-sense gun safety reforms that Americans from across the political spectrum actually agree on. It's only the special interests and politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell who are standing in the way of bipartisan action to make our communities safer.

I'm also incredibly alarmed that our elections remain vulnerable to foreign interference. This is an issue I've been fighting hard on, despite Republican obstruction in the Senate. Still, we're making headway and gradually winning the bipartisan support we need to get this done before the 2020 elections.

These are two areas where we need action immediately, and I'm planning to keep up the fight in the Senate. But right now, I want to know what issue matters to you the most. **[Derek, if you haven't taken my fall survey yet, will you weigh in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c7/53d9897e/52a61baa/1c8e09f7/1661339478/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-stratresend3")**

Thanks,
Mark

**** ****
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c7/53d9897e/52a61baa/1c8e09f6/1661339478/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20190919db__231__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")******
---
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: BREAKING NEWS: They called it a "stunt"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d197/6cd27893/51afcfaf/15871fbb/3852580285/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| |

We're just now learning how top officials at the Department of Homeland Security reacted to my June 2018 visit to the border that blew the lid off the child separation and detention scandal.

**In emails just discovered by a watchdog organization, Trump's Homeland Security officials called it "some sort of stunt".**
The fact that they see oversight by Congress as a "stunt" says it all. To them, children are pawns and nobody should ask any questions. Well, I'm sorry if they don't like me asking questions, but they better get used to it. Because let me be clear: Their treatment of children is cruel. It is inhumane. And I will never, ever stop fighting to stop Donald Trump on this evil policy.

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: WE HAVE BEEN CENSORED BY THE LIBERAL LEFT!!!
body:
ATTENTION PATRIOTS! We have been targeted by the LIBERAL LEFT and HIGH TECH COMPANIES. Our 1st Amendment Rights are at stake. The Conservative Minori
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=85729.1233.1.95003a84b64cb11bca35eaa7f0fcfcea) |
---
# ATTENTION PATRIOTS!
---
We have been targeted by the LIBERAL LEFT and HIGH TECH COMPANIES. Our 1st Amendment Rights are at stake. The Conservative Minorities have been officially targeted! IF WE DO NOTHING WE WILL BE THE NEXT CUBA OR VENEZUELA! What we have here is modern day lynching! When minorities had NO RIGHTS and they tried leaving their plantations they were whipped, beaten or lynched. Now the Liberal Left and the Social Media Techs have joined forces and are silencing minorities by striking us with NO 1st Amendments Rights. WE WILL NOT BE SILENCED!!! Where is our JUSTICE?
What will YOU do?
Where are our elected officials? We put out the following "press release" today. **PRESS RELEASE** **For Immediate Release**
**For More Information contact: Bianca Gracia, President** Latinos for Trump Org.
On September 18th, Twitter management suspended the accounts for the entire leadership team of Latinos for Trump organization, who operates under Americanos. As a company that claim’s its purpose is “to serve the public conversation,” the unjustified suspensions of these accounts is not only contrary to their stated purpose, but also silences the voice of a significant minority group.

Twitter suspended our user accounts without providing a warning and without providing a reason for the suspension. We are still conducting an internal review of the situation but have found nothing to justify a suspension. What we have found is the suspect timing and comprehensive nature of the suspensions. These suspension came in less than 48 hours since President Trump held his rally in New Mexico. During this rally, numerous Hispanic supporters where seen on TV wearing “Latinos for Trump” T-shirts. In less than 48 hours later, all our leadership accounts were suspended by Twitter.
Although Twitter claims to enforce their rules “impartially and consistently” and will let someone know “about actions taken against your account and why,” they have not. Although Twitter claims to “be transparent about actions we take,” they have not. We are deeply troubled by the overly secretive and discriminatory actions by Twitter management against our Latino based group. We also invite greater public scrutiny into the troubling actions of Twitter. Accounts affected: @FabMagaDiva @reallatinos4US @WeAreAmericanos @HispanicTrumpTX @CassieJ_Tx
@secureUSA45 @mgtz1995 @Spi3 @Spi3inc @orejitagirl @HenryGrullon4 AND MANY MORE! Bianca Gracia, President
Latinos for Trump Org
WE ARE AMERICANOS!
latinosfortrump.us
latinotrumpcoalition@gmail.com Centered text
---
|
---

Friend,

_Gov. Holcomb has been laser-focused on curbing the drug epidemic in Indiana and helping Hoosiers lead healthier lives. And the results are showing._

**Because of his work on this, along with his efforts on education, infrastructure, and workforce development, Gov. Holcomb has been named the 2019 Government Leader of the Year by the Indiana Chamber of Commerce!**

Through programs like the Indiana Workforce Initiative with the Indiana Chamber, more Hoosiers are getting their lives back and getting back to work – and families across our state are benefitting. New programs are in place to curb smoking, and to make Indiana a Midwest leader in infant mortality.

Helping Hoosier lead healthier lives is just one more way Gov. Holcomb is Putting People First.
[ **Add your name to confirm your endorsement of Gov. Holcomb!** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=71674966d2eb4a9f9aea3df970e7720e&_e=UnDXIReWzeW-LPmy50nlFYt6dvfwpvH30zXlT1IEEU_Xb8XaXFCUhfqCT9iSHkpFweDKACznoXBCEHeN89Lvi3xmAnOsqVUWCbz4pqyp5b5sOdK3LC31I_ul3NSeK1SE2GeBcSlnO9StT4FBfLbSVQMFLSGjPBmYSiEnH2c5ieNvpkANTMj3qa8qfwMXNUoUg4d5ZTJTwKuz5_Ihi-ZoLq3cvq4FXvaNb6zBKPJRIqXLA7TXmb3_8sz-egRZssYAJ7efboIT6xuw7tX7EWj7BM-BEVeKKZCgvfPgqiTy2mC3um80k5d_vbzgsvI0yzgeFc1X22jYfp7ls8JB46X9A-jF2t9QB5YnicSTfCcy_vzgcLI3N4oUgacetQLt3MnAmYU6zZhPuuvcAuYQA-ZCQXFc8tg8S5Qxj3BNFG7zK21oqWYluGzGGpVQ81ZZ0zi8)
_Gov. Holcomb is deeply honored to receive this award, but it’s not really about him. It’s about the Hoosiers across our state who have given him the chance to lead. It’s about the Hoosiers who have taken full advantage of resources to create greater opportunities for themselves and their families._

Gov. Holcomb is looking to the future, positioning our state for 10 years from now, 15 years from now and beyond. By creating opportunities for individuals, families, businesses, and communities to thrive, we’ll make Indiana the best state in America for people to live, work, play and stay.

**[If you believe in this bold, bright future for Indiana that Gov. Holcomb is helping to build, add your name to confirm your endorsement of Gov. Holcomb.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=71674966d2eb4a9f9aea3df970e7720e&_e=UnDXIReWzeW-LPmy50nlFYt6dvfwpvH30zXlT1IEEU_Xb8XaXFCUhfqCT9iSHkpFweDKACznoXBCEHeN89Lvi3xmAnOsqVUWCbz4pqyp5b5sOdK3LC31I_ul3NSeK1SE2GeBcSlnO9StT4FBfLbSVQMFLSGjPBmYSiEnH2c5ieNvpkANTMj3qa8qfwMXNUoUg4d5ZTJTwKuz5_Ihi-ZoLq3cvq4FXvaNb6zBKPJRIqVQRGj3-9txxapR4iMB-Hqcdu9czdlv7obc_rat97iBD39gPXP2APujKP6H3ZFFwrr-_OoES1sb5L_DJYY6rolnC3Fd9U0M9Dgsz5PtIYZCoc1KxyTDXUfvJYjU9pJHk0uxqmsYnGlTwo4J2MnjWkCIQSoxVjk2QtSO5cvs83BypaHL5uhBwvyWTqFh74dd5j83q9ZD4M_sbkySpEMJlFE_)**

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Top five things that mattered this week:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
_Prefer not to receive these weekly campaign updates? We totally understand.**[Click here to opt out of our newsletter updates!](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59a4/1331810452/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/newsletter-opt-out?source=em_20190919")**_
Hey team, happy Thursday! I hope you're having a good week -- we're still so proud of Cory from the third debate, and working hard to keep up the momentum.
Here's the latest from this past week:
**Debate night.**
For the third debate in a row, Cory won the night. He showed Democrats how he will heal our country and make real change for Americans facing injustice and seeking opportunities. **If you 're just as inspired as we are from Cory's debate performance, let the world know by using #Cory2020 on social media about why you're supporting Cory.**
**It 's almost that time.**
In 11 days, we'll be closing the books on our current fundraising quarter and filing a report with the FEC. When we report our financial numbers publicly, we need to have a strong showing. There are some candidates in this race who have massive online donor networks or the ability to self-fund a campaign. We need to be able to keep up our fundraising with candidates who have those advantages. **[Can you chip in today to help us meet our end-of-quarter goal?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_x_20190919_AD_20190919-x-AD-ADupdate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
**Check out this video.**
Bringing people together has been at the center of Cory's career. Even when he was a Newark city councilmember two decades ago, he sought to lead through unity instead of division. That's who Cory Booker is. We released a new video that tells the story of his time in public life and how his message has been the same throughout the years. **[Watch the video and share it.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59a2/1331810452/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/CoryBooker/status/1172341355709751296")**
**Weekend of Action.**
This Saturday and Sunday, we had another successful Weekend of Action. Volunteers in the early states of Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina mobilized in their communities to talk with voters and caucus-goers about why Cory should be our next president. These conversations with our family members, friends, and neighbors are how we're going to win this election. **[Sign up to get involved in your area.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59a1/1331810452/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/get-involved/")**
**Cory 's plan to stand up for workers.**
Yesterday, we released Cory's plan to stand up for workers and their ability to organize on the job. Cory's proposal will protect labor rights and make it easier for workers to join a union. Cory Booker will be a pro-union president. **[Take a look at Cory's plan.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59a0/1331810452/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/issues/economic-security-and-opportunity/opportunity-and-justice-for-workers/")**
Talk soon,
Addisu
Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020
_P.S. We also have this awesome**[new limited edition debate sticker](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-debate-sticker?refcode=em_x_20190919_AD_20190919-x-AD-ADupdate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** up for grabs. Get yours before they're out of stock, Dagnabbit!_
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59ae/1331810452/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59ad/1331810452/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59ac/1331810452/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59ab/1331810452/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59aa/1331810452/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bde/5fca0d19/743230ee/291e59ae/1331810452/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Our Revolution
subject: ENDORSEMENT: Bernie Sanders for president
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Friend,

Bernie Sanders has spent his entire life fighting for the rights of working families. **That is why Our Revolution is so proud to be supporting his candidacy for president of the United States.**

[_**We are committed to transforming our country by bringing working people into the political process. Help us continue growing the people-powered movement that Bernie started by donating to Our Revolution today ->**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/restore_democracy2020?amount=27&recurring=true&email=&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+We+are+committed+to+transforming+our+cou&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2")

Last month, Bernie announced his plan to double union membership in his first term as president -- and when 20,000 AT&T workers went on strike days later, Bernie joined them on the picket line. From Amazon, to McDonald's, to Verizon, to Walmart, Bernie has consistently stood in solidarity with workers who demand better wages from their corporate employers.

Establishment Democrats want "anybody but Bernie" because they understand that our progressive movement is the only true threat to the corporations and billionaires who dominate our economic and political systems. They're afraid of what happens when workers get organized, and they'll do anything to stop ordinary people from standing up for their rights.

[_**Donate to Our Revolution to help us continue organizing the 99% and electing progressive candidates at the local and national level across the country ->**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/restore_democracy2020?amount=27&recurring=true&email=&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Donate+to+Our+Revolution+to+help+us+cont&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2")

Our Revolution has endorsed over **fifty candidates** this year. We've already won a slew of elections -- just last week we had eight candidates win in Nashville, TN and Somerville, MA -- and we've won major victories on ballot measures across the country, including a public banking bill that passed the California legislature last week.

We know that the way to defeat the establishment is through organizing, but it's important that we're honest with you -- **each of these candidates and ballot measures faces an uphill battle.** When you fight against the establishment, they will fight like hell to stop you. That's why we're depending on your support -- every cent that you donate is critical to bringing true progressive candidates across the finish line.

[_**Every candidate that Our Revolution has endorsed can win, but we must do everything we can to help them. Chip in now to support the political revolution ->**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/restore_democracy2020?amount=27&recurring=true&email=&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+Every+candidate+that+Our+Revolution+has+&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2") | [Contribute $2.70 Now](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/restore_democracy2020?amount=2.70&recurring=true&email=&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+Contribute+270+Now&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190919_1_2")

subject: urgent: all hands on deck

body:
| |
---
| **URGENT REQUEST:** Did you see this breaking news? We need all hands on deck to show their support for Ed Markey. _**[Will you rush $27 or more to stand with Ed?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:
* * *
**CBS News: Joe Kennedy III will challenge Ed Markey in Senate primary**

_**[Rush $27 or more to stand with Ed!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Team: Ed Markey is on the front lines of the fights that define our times, and he's ready to win.

That's why Massachusetts leaders and progressive champions are standing with Ed, and the endorsements keep rolling in!

✅Elizabeth Warren is standing with Ed.

name: Team Beto
subject: Beto wrote a book on legalizing weed. You can get one for yourself when you donate any amount today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Beto just released a comprehensive plan to end the failed War on Drugs,
legalize marijuana, and repair injustices in our nation’s drug policies.

But this isn’t a new fight for Beto. Way before it was politically
popular, Beto published a book in 2011 calling for the legalization of
marijuana.

For a limited time, we’re sending a copy of that book to everyone who
donates any amount on this email. Keep in mind, it costs us to print and
ship each book.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34506?refcode=ema20190919-56179&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=56179%2E444211%2EpWzAo5 ]Contribute any amount right now and we’ll send you Beto’s book.

Thanks for reading (the email, and hopefully the book)!

- Team Beto

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: NEW POLL: Kelly tied with McSally in close AZ Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Former astronaut and Navy fighter pilot Mark Kelly is now tied 42 to 42 with GOP incumbent Senator Martha McSally in their highly watched Senate race. Arizona is one of the critical states needed for Democrats to flip the Senate blue, and Mark Kelly stands a good chance of doing just that. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws _**multiple times!**_ She was previously fined for taking $319,000 in contributions above the individual limit and failing to disclose tens of thousands of dollars in donations from PACs in her 2014 House campaign \-- which she won by just 161 votes. Then, it came out that she hadn't reported another $50,000 in donations during that campaign. _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have released their latest Senate race ratings, and they've placed Martha McSally's Arizona seat firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 128 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Who do you support for U.S. Senate?** **[Mark Kelly](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1c/6e9863e8/14c68ab8/1db0df3d/2360886350/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/yVga84iw")** **[Martha McSally](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1c/6e9863e8/14c68ab8/1db0df3d/2360886350/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/yVga84iw")** Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1c/6e9863e8/14c68ab8/1db0df3c/2360886350/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190919a.ND-b&refcode2=WbZ6RAPexivFH3Nrfope")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

name: Team Stanton
subject: $200/week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Yesterday, Greg wrote to you about how the shockingly high cost of childcare in Maricopa County is hurting working Arizona families.

**Hard working Arizona families deserve more affordable childcare than $200+ a week, which is why Greg is working hard in Congress to identify solutions to make high quality childcare more affordable. **

[**Will you join Greg in calling on Congress to take action to make childcare more affordable?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8DLsgPOh1fhk1o7i9L5-DbkQI_ns9OegRFZILAfUcKg=/_TAoxrTfxz2utCZiOBkDhoPRE1Ld2PABj2bjQ69o2Hs=)

Thank you,

\-- _Team Stanton _

name: Bennet Campaign HQ
subject: IMPORTANT → we're closing the revolving door in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | [Three years ago, Trump made a lot of promises about draining the swamp and getting lobbyists out of government decision-making - it hasn't worked out:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=") [For the last decade, Michael has led the charge on banning members of Congress from ever becoming lobbyists to close the revolving door in Washington.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

You don't go to Washington to get rich -- you go to serve the American people.

But corporate special interest groups have flooded Congress with dark money, allowing members to leave office and make millions.

That's why Michael is running for president: He wants to clean up corruption in government - but he needs people like you to sign this petition and show robust support for the plan.

[Sign on now. Let Michael know you're standing with him to put a lifetime ban on members of Congress ever becoming lobbyists:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

---
| [SIGN ON NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---
[It's up to us to fix our broken politics by overcoming the forces trying to separate the American people from our government.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Corporate special interest groups replace the public's agenda with their own.

It's time we close the revolving door in Washington.

[Michael is working to get money out of politics and stop the corrupting influence of corporate special interests on our government. Will you join him? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

---

---
| [SIGN ON NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf5a/134673f2/a9610aa/69960e18/2873749045/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_091919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Thanks,

Team Bennet
