name: Britainy Beshear
subject: If we haven't met yet...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Andy and I have been married for nearly 14 years, and I truly believe he is the best choice for governor.
|
---

| | Peter,

If we haven't met yet, I'm Andy's wife, Britainy. In a minute, **[I'm going to ask you to make a small donation -- whatever you can](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db4654f/3060956391/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?refcode=20190919nd__270__&amount=5")** \-- to Andy's campaign for governor. But first, I'll explain why I'm asking.

Andy and I have been married for nearly 14 years, and I truly believe he is the best choice for governor. It's not just because he's proven himself as attorney general and proven himself as a leader who fights for Kentuckians who have been attacked, silenced, and ignored.

**It 's because of who he is at his core.** Andy was raised with the values of family, faith, and hard work, and he's teaching those values to our own children. He knows Kentucky and its people through and through. He was educated in our public schools -- so he knows exactly why we need to make Kentucky's schools the envy of the nation.

Andy has seen firsthand how a lack of health care, as well as the opioid epidemic, harm us. So, he's fighting for our access to quality care and going after rogue doctors and drug traffickers. He's also seen how corruption and secrecy in Frankfort have led to the people's voice being silenced -- so he's committed to transparently serving.

Those are just a few of the reasons I think Andy is the right choice to lead Kentucky. It's not about the title. It's about the job. Between Andy's ideas and the great people who are on our team, I know we can get it done.

But it'll take a lot of hard work -- and yes, your financial contributions. **That 's why I'm asking you to make a donation today. Even if you can only give a few dollars, I promise it will make a difference.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db4654c/3060956391/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?express_lane=true&refcode=20190919nd__270__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db4654d/3060956391/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?express_lane=true&refcode=20190919nd__270__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db46542/3060956391/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?express_lane=true&refcode=20190919nd__270__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db46543/3060956391/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?express_lane=true&refcode=20190919nd__270__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db46540/3060956391/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?express_lane=true&refcode=20190919nd__270__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db46541/3060956391/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?refcode=20190919nd__270__")** Together, we're building a strong grassroots campaign to bring change to Frankfort. Andy and I need you on our side.

Thank you so much!
Britainy Beshear | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a79/ad6dc73/1422093d/db4654f/3060956391/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/britainy-intro?refcode=20190919nd__270__&amount=5")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Share your thoughts on campaign finance reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In late July, Senate Democrats unveiled a constitutional amendment that would bring an end to the 2010 _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision \-- a ruling that opened the floodgates to nearly unlimited political spending in elections. This amendment would allow Congress to eliminate the loopholes that allow companies to pour millions of dollars into campaigns and sway elections. Democrats have previously tried to pass this amendment in 2014 \-- but #MoscowMitch McConnell filibustered it and killed it before it could go to the states for ratification. He's intent on preserving the tight grip dark money and corporate donors have on our politics and preventing everyday Americans from having their voices heard in Congress. With this new Democratic push, we're asking engaged Democrats what they think. If that sounds like you, please answer our quick survey: **Do you think campaign finance reform is essential to protecting our democracy?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1e/6e9863e8/14c00711/1db0dfb1/3187836103/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/7W7NU2fo") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1e/6e9863e8/14c00711/1db0dfb1/3187836103/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/7W7NU2fo") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1e/6e9863e8/14c00711/1db0dfb0/3187836103/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190919b.ND-b&refcode2=4yRbwcyGmhj5l77dJxIy")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump tours border wall progress
body:
In San Diego, California, President Donald J. Trump got an up-close look yesterday at the great progress being made on new and replacement...

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a39eeb2d0d&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • September 19, 2019

** Video of the day: President Trump tours border wall progress
------------------------------------------------------------

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e8a1d9f8c&e=3ee4985eea

In San Diego, California, President Donald J. Trump got an up-close look yesterday at the great progress being made on new and replacement border wall.

“We’re building it at a breakneck speed,” the President said after receiving an update from Border Patrol officials. All told, the wall will “be over 400 miles. And we think we can get it close to 500 miles by the end of next year,” he added.

President Trump’s goal has always been to stop illegal immigration and protect the American people. Now, with border wall construction underway, the results are undeniable: Illegal border crossings plummeted 30 percent between July and August.

“Nobody is coming in unless they’re coming in legally. They’re coming in through a process,” the President said.

** TOMORROW: Australia State Visit begins!
------------------------------------------------------------
President Trump and the First Lady will welcome Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison and First Lady Jenny Morrison to the White House tomorrow for an arrival ceremony to kick off their official State Visit to Washington.

The visit will be a celebration of the close relationship and shared history between America and Australia. Throughout the weekend, President Trump and Prime Minister Morrison will reaffirm our common vision for global peace, security, and prosperity.

Official State Visits are large, formal affairs, as are appropriate to show respect to a visiting leader. The end goal of the occasion, however, is practical: President Trump and visiting heads of state meet for working sessions throughout any such visit.

In that spirit, the weekend will be filled with major events, both ceremonial and policy-specific. In addition to tomorrow’s welcome ceremony, the President and First Lady will host a State Dinner on Friday evening. On Sunday, Prime Minister Morrison will join President Trump in Ohio to tour a new, Australian-owned manufacturing facility, highlighting the strong U.S.–Australia trade relationship and its importance for American workers.

In photos: A look back at President Trump’s first State Visit with France (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e5fa070955&e=3ee4985eea)

LIVE: Watch the arrival ceremony for Australia tomorrow at 9 a.m. ET (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=49cefa44dc&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
President Donald J. Trump visits the border area of Otay Mesa, a neighborhood along the Mexican border in San Diego, California | September 18, 2019

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fee26b218c&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58a658b79d&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=bef21a2d58)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Team Weld
subject: What’s going on here?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCFW8T9JGue6hvaitvCCCU-8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190919_fr&n=1) Yesterday, it broke in the _Washington Post_ that a whistleblower had gone to the Intelligence Community Inspector General to file a complaint about President Trump. What we know right now from yesterday’s reporting and reporting done today by the _New York Times_ is that this complaint involves multiple acts by the president, including a commitment the president made with another world leader. We’re not going to speculate about what was made, or who it was made to, but we will say this: **The American people deserve a president they can trust will have the best interests of America in mind when on the phone with leaders from around the world.** President Trump’s behavior, first as a candidate and as president, has not inspired that confidence. And while we wait to learn more details about this potentially troubling news, we’re reminded of the choice we hope to give the American people in 2020. Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCFW8T9JGue6hvaitvCCCU-8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190919_fr&n=2)
---

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190919_fr&n=4) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190919_fr&n=5).

name: Team Beto
subject: Legalize it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

It's
time to end the War on Drugs.

That’s why, today, Beto announced a sweeping plan to legalize marijuana
and end the war once and for all.

But, it’s not enough for us to just end the War on Drugs — we need to
actually start to repair the damage it has wrought on communities of
color.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190919-pm/?source=ema20190919-56216&t=1001&akid=56216%2E444211%2Ed-4MRm ]If you agree with Beto, stand with him by adding your name to support
his sweeping new plan here.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190919-pm/?source=ema20190919-56216&t=1002&akid=56216%2E444211%2Ed-4MRm ]Add your name »

That damage from the War on Drugs has been compounding for decades. Black
and brown communities across America still face over-policing and
criminalization as a result of our government’s misplaced priorities.

Beto believes it’s our responsibility to remedy these injustices and help
the people and communities who have been most impacted by that misguided
war.

That’s why, in addition to legalizing marijuana and ending the War on
Drugs, Beto’s plan will:

* Grant clemency to those who are currently serving sentences for
marijuana possession.

* Build a model for marijuana regulation that is similar to how we
regulate alcohol.

* Create a licensing program that grants the majority of licenses to
produce, distribute, or sell marijuana to minority-owned businesses
and those disproportionately impacted by the War on Drugs.

* Provide “Drug War Justice Grants” to those formerly incarcerated for
nonviolent marijuana offenses after their release.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190919-pm/?source=ema20190919-56216&t=1003&akid=56216%2E444211%2Ed-4MRm ]If you agree with Beto that we need to end the War on Drugs and begin
to repair its damage to black and brown communities, add your name now.

Of course, it will take time and it will take work for us to make up for
decades of punitive War on Drugs policies. That’s why Beto is starting by
embracing systemic, sweeping reforms.

Together, we can begin to right these wrongs and heal the damage.

Thank you,
Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190919-pm/?source=ema20190919-56216&t=1004&akid=56216%2E444211%2Ed-4MRm ]Stand with Beto »

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190919footer&t=1005&refcode2=56216_444211_d-4MRm&akid=56216%2E444211%2Ed-4MRm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=56216%2E444211%2Ed-4MRm

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The company Cory Gardner keeps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
In just over one week, Gardner will be headlining a high-dollar fundraiser for Trump's re-election. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714c7/691c9bd/6e064e69/11a7ab56/1827611085/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, in just over one week we'll be facing the first quarterly fundraising deadline of this campaign. Pundits and political observers will use our numbers to judge the strength of our campaign, **which makes it essential that we file a strong FEC report after September 30**.

[**_Chip in now to make sure we show everyone who 's watching that we're building this grassroots campaign the right way--one donation at a time._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190919_JH_20190919-fr-JH-trumpcory-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

While we're busy building this campaign for Colorado, Cory Gardner's priorities are elsewhere. **In just over two weeks,_Gardner will be headlining a high-dollar fundraiser for Trump 's re-election_.**

On top of voting 98% of the time with Trump and being his yes-man in the Senate, Gardner has time to raise money for him--but not to hold town halls with his own constituents.

You can rest assured that, down the road, Trump will be ready to return the favor for Gardner by fundraising and hitting the campaign trail for him--and we need to be ready.

**Before the end of the quarter, we need to show we have what it takes to keep up with Gardner, no matter how much his special interest allies --or the president--rush to his aid.** [**_Will you chip in today and help show our grassroots strength on our first FEC report?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190919_JH_20190919-fr-JH-trumpcory-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190919_JH_20190919-fr-JH-trumpcory-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") **_**_** **_**_**

body:

**URGENT UPDATE:**
**CBS News: Joe Kennedy III will challenge Ed Markey in Senate primary**

_**[Rush $27 or more to stand with Ed!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091919_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
Team: Ed Markey is on the front lines of the fights that define our times, and he's ready to win.

Support for Ed is broad, diverse, deep, and growing. He's endorsed by:

➜ Elizabeth Warren
➜ Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
➜ AFSCME Council 93, which represents 30,000 local and state government employees
➜ Progressive organizations like NARAL, LCV Action Fund, Coalition for Social Justice, the Sierra Club, the Sunrise Movement, 350 Massachusetts, and more
➜ And 73% of the Massachusetts state legislature

But we need to know if we can add your name to this growing list.

_**[Will you pitch in $27 or more now and show Ed that you stand with him to fight for our progressive values?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091919_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

We need to show everyone that our people-powered movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality -- is more powerful than ever.

Ed wants to continue leading those fights in the United States Senate, but he can't do it without you.

_**[Please, rush a donation to show you stand with Ed in the fights for our progressive values.](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091919_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Tina Smith
subject: Have you heard Greta Thunberg?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Climate change is already damaging our health and our environment. Our country needs to lead the charge in tackling this crisis -- are you with me?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

It's simple: Are we leaders or followers?

This week, climate activist Greta Thunberg spoke to our Senate Climate Change Task Force. Here's what she shared:

"I don't want you to listen to me. I want you to listen to the scientists, and I want you to unite behind science. And then I want you to take real action."

Her words were powerful. Her dedication to solving this crisis - and making sure others are working on it too - is inspiring. And she's right: We need real action.

Here in Minnesota, we are already seeing the impact of weather pattern changes - from our farming communities to our riverfront infrastructure.

And yet in the Senate, Mitch McConnell refuses to bring any legislation to address climate change to a vote.

And even worse, my Republican opponent Jason Lewis has openly denied global warming, saying that it's a "theory whose fundamental premise looks weaker every day."

**[We need a leader to take action on climate change, and I'm stepping up. Chip in $5, $10, $15 or more right now to make sure we can continue tackling this together.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412f0/c1f7015/67a759b5/11466648/2499141588/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkxOWNsaW1hdGVsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412f0/c1f7015/67a759b5/11466649/2499141588/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkxOWNsaW1hdGVsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412f0/c1f7015/67a759b5/1146664a/2499141588/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkxOWNsaW1hdGVsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412f0/c1f7015/67a759b5/1146664b/2499141588/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkxOWNsaW1hdGVsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412f0/c1f7015/67a759b5/1146664c/2499141588/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkxOWNsaW1hdGVsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412f0/c1f7015/67a759b5/1146664d/2499141588/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkxOWNsaW1hdGVsZWFkZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full-exp&amount=25")
---
This year I have introduced the Clean Energy Standard Act to set a net-zero target for emissions from the electric sector, and the American Energy Efficiency Act that matches the market incentives states have made to make renewable energy sources affordable.

**I am choosing to lead on tackling the climate crisis, and our country needs to do the same. We can't sit back on this, nor can we let someone who denies climate change be in the U.S. Senate.**

**[Chip in now if you're with me.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks for being with me on this,

Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190919climateleader-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com]().
